prose.en: Report system vulnerabilities associated with reported incidents to {param:ir-06.02_odp}.

guidance.en: Reported incidents that uncover system vulnerabilities are analyzed by organizational personnel including system owners, mission and business owners, senior agency information security officers, senior agency officials for privacy, authorizing officials, and the risk executive (function). The analysis can serve to prioritize and initiate mitigation actions to address the discovered system vulnerability.

prose.en: system vulnerabilities associated with reported incidents are reported to {param:ir-06.02_odp}.

objects.en: security incident reports and associated system vulnerabilities
Organizational personnel with incident reporting responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security and privacy responsibilities
personnel to whom vulnerabilities associated with security incidents are to be reported
mechanisms supporting and/or implementing the reporting of vulnerabilities associated with security incidents

guidelines.en: personnel or roles to whom system vulnerabilities associated with reported incidents are reported to is/are defined;
